runtimeAppNameObserved: Enterprise Service Request & Complian r4ce Review
repairSummary: Changed app wiring to use Yeeflow runtime field keys such as Text3 and Datetime1 instead of display/internal labels where list query templates read row values.

Patched embedded generated copies of the query templates to recognize response.listData/ListData and to retry broad queryItems calls without selectedFields when projected queries return empty payloads.
Preserved the original template source files; the compatibility patch is applied only while embedding scripts into the generated showcase package.

checks: TSX esbuild check for all 13 source templates
field/list uniqueness and field.ListID ownership checks

evidence: Fresh import opened to real dashboard/home page, not blank component builder.
Navigation showed generated dashboard, 9 data lists, and approval form.
Dashboard and data lists opened with custom fields and seeded records.
Custom Code controls were visible on dashboard and approval form.

templates.name: activity-timeline
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime FieldName keys for event fields and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered seeded activity events, including Request submitted and Manager review started.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only render with seeded list data; persistence is not applicable.

templates.name: approval-decision-panel
templates.fixAttempted: Kept configured on Review Service Request page with decision/comment variables.
templates.evidence: Packaged in approval form review page, but no live reviewer task/review page was reached during this smoke.
templates.remainingBlocker: Needs reviewer task/runtime approval context to test decision selection and comment writeback.

templates.name: approval-timeline
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime FieldName keys for history fields and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered seeded approval history with Submitted and Manager Review records.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only render with seeded list data; live workflow history remains a future deeper test.

templates.name: checklist-compliance-block
templates.fixAttempted: No wiring change needed in this pass.
templates.evidence: Checkbox interaction updated progress and wrote checklist JSON to the configured output field.
templates.remainingBlocker: Full form submission persistence not retested in this pass.

templates.name: dependent-selector
templates.fixAttempted: Use source list runtime fields for parent/child and seeded matching category/subcategory records.
templates.evidence: Parent select populated; choosing Hardware enabled child options and choosing Laptop wrote Hardware/Laptop to output fields.

templates.name: distribution-chart-module
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime grouping field Text3 and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered Requests by Status with 4 total and seeded Completed, Manager Review, Open, and Overdue segments.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only seeded data render.

templates.name: exception-alert-panel
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime fields for exception title/severity/description/status and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered 3 exception records, including Overdue Laptop Repair, Vendor Security Review, and CRM Access Change.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only seeded data render.

templates.name: hierarchical-selector
templates.fixAttempted: Use source list runtime hierarchy fields and seeded category tree records.
templates.evidence: Rendered 4 hierarchy records and selecting Hardware wrote ["Hardware"] to the configured output field.

templates.name: kpi-card-set
templates.fixAttempted: No query wiring change; values remain static JSON config.
templates.evidence: Rendered configured KPI values 42, 91.4%, and 7 correctly.
templates.remainingBlocker: Data-bound KPI calculation is not proven because the template instance uses static JSON config.

templates.name: multi-entry-tag-input
templates.fixAttempted: No wiring change needed in this pass.
templates.evidence: Adding tag security created a chip and wrote ["security"] to the configured output field.
templates.remainingBlocker: Full form submission persistence not retested in this pass.

templates.name: related-record-summary-grid
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime target list fields and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered Acme Managed Services and Finance Laptop Pool related records as table/card data.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only seeded data render.

templates.name: smart-lookup-picker
templates.fixAttempted: No template-source change; kept app wiring with runtime list IDs and output bindings.
templates.contextTested: Dashboard visibility and approval form search/select/writeback
templates.evidence: Search for Acme returned Acme Managed Services, selection created a chip and wrote combined JSON with imported record ID.
templates.remainingBlocker: Dashboard temp output and data-list custom form persistence were not retested in this pass; public form not tested.

templates.name: trend-chart-module
templates.fixAttempted: Use runtime date field Datetime1 and patch query helper response extraction/fallbacks.
templates.evidence: Rendered Monthly Request Trend with 4 total seeded dated records.
templates.remainingBlocker: None for read-only seeded data render.

notes: Public form support remains untested and is not claimed.
Approval-decision-panel remains the only unproven template in this pass because a reviewer task context was not reached.
Original template source files were not modified.
